web.title: Absorb LMS & Single-Sign On (SSO)
web.description: SSO Protocols. There are two major SSO protocols supported by Absorb. SAML (short for Security Assertion Markup Language) and OpenID Connect.

web.title: Configure Absorb LMS for Single sign-on with Microsoft Entra ID
web.description: To configure the integration of Absorb LMS into Microsoft Entra ID, you need to add Absorb LMS from the gallery to your list of managed SaaS apps.

web.title: Incoming SAML 2.0 Single Sign-On using Azure AD
web.description: Part 3: Configure Azure AD SSO · In the Azure portal, on the Absorb LMS application integration page, find the Manage section and select Single Sign-On (SSO).

web.title: How to Configure SAML 2.0 for Absorb - Setup SSO - Okta
web.description: The Okta/AbsorbLMS SAML integration currently supports the following features: IdP-initiated SSO; SP-initiated SSO. Configuration Steps. Login to the Absorb ...

web.title: Absorb LMS Single Sign-On SSO - miniOrange
web.description: SSO solution by miniOrange provides secure Single Sign-On access into Absorb LMS using a single set of login credentials.
